summary: Verstappen pursues his eleventh straight victory as McLaren's resurgent pace threatens to derail Red Bull's dominance at Spa-Francorchamps. Hamilton's Spanish breakthrough injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's championship bid, setting up a three-way tactical battle in the high-speed corners where aerodynamic efficiency decides positions. A podium finish for either McLaren or Ferrari would reshape the constructors' championship momentum heading into the season's final third.
